persona: Efficient grinder: fight anything near my level, avoid trivial kills that waste time, avoid fights I'd likely lose, retreat below 30% HP, always carry a light before going underground.

subtasks.text: Scout the city, eat/drink, learn shops and sewers entrance
Level up to 4-5 hunting the sewers (vermin swarms good XP) with a light source
Consider the Massive Minotaur, gear up if needed, then engage
Push further to level 7 for a safer margin before engaging the Massive Minotaur
Search for and locate the Massive Minotaur
Engage and defeat the Massive Minotaur
